bridge_token.description: Shared bearer token required by live-room gateway.

streaming_enabled.description: Enable NDJSON streaming replies for /live-room/generate when the gateway requests stream=true.

host.description: Bind host inside AstrBot container. Use 0.0.0.0 for Docker-network-only access.

system_prompt.description: Optional role-facing system prompt prepended to LLM calls.
system_prompt.default: 你是 Hoshia，星见大学的大一女生，运动系猫娘。你正在和一个总能联系上的特殊网友聊天。保持像熟人聊天一样自然、温暖、简短；默认用中文回复，除非对方明确要求其他语言。只按普通大学生日常来回应，不把自己说成后台产物、表演角色、房间角色或被研究的人，也不要提到后台插件、接口、字段名或工程实现。

judge_provider_name.description: Small model provider used to decide whether Hoshia should proactively reply when nobody mentioned her.

proactive_reply_threshold.description: Heartflow-lite threshold from 0 to 1. Higher means Hoshia speaks less when not mentioned.

min_proactive_interval_seconds.description: Minimum seconds between non-mention proactive replies.

energy_decay.description: Energy consumed by each proactive reply.

energy_recovery.description: Energy recovered whenever a non-mention batch is skipped.

livingmemory_enabled.description: Enable LivingMemory recall/write integration for web live-room viewers.

livingmemory_auto_summary_enabled.description: Summarize stable viewer facts and write them to LivingMemory after successful replies.

livingmemory_persona_id.description: Persona ID used to isolate Hoshia live-room memories.

livingmemory_recall_k.description: Maximum LivingMemory items recalled for each viewer or news pool.

livingmemory_max_participants.description: Maximum live-room viewers recalled/summarized per batch.

livingmemory_news_retention_days.description: Retention hint stored in metadata for daily news memories.

livingmemory_recent_state_retention_days.description: Default retention days for temporary recent-state viewer memories.

news_capability_enabled.description: Enable the RSSHub + Tavily news topic capability inside the bridge.

news_refresh_enabled.description: Run the news topic refresh scheduler inside AstrBot bridge.

news_room_id.description: Live-room room_id whose LivingMemory news pool receives scheduled topic memories.

news_refresh_hour.description: Local hour of day for scheduled news refresh, 0-23.

news_refresh_timezone.description: Timezone used by the news refresh scheduler.

news_refresh_on_startup.description: Run one news refresh shortly after bridge startup.

news_source_urls.description: Comma-separated RSSHub/RSS/JSON feed URLs. Prefer internal self-hosted RSSHub URLs such as http://rsshub:1200/...

news_refresh_max_items.description: Maximum deduplicated feed items sent to the topic editor per refresh.

news_refresh_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout for RSSHub and Tavily requests.

tavily_api_key.description: Private Tavily API key used only for selective background search. Keep it in server-side AstrBot config.

knowledge_lookup_enabled.description: Allow the bridge to selectively use Tavily before chat replies when a viewer mentions an unfamiliar work, meme, song, game, movie, or niche term. The tool name and sources are never exposed to Hoshia.

knowledge_lookup_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout for selective Tavily knowledge lookup during chat replies.

tavily_max_queries_per_refresh.description: Maximum Tavily background-search calls per news refresh.

news_retention_days.description: Retention days for daily news topic memories. Overrides livingmemory_news_retention_days for news topics.
